summary: Comprehensive testing of Bulk Shipping feature added to Shri Maruti Logistics dashboard. All new features tested and working: Bulk Ship tab with 423+ shippable orders, search filter, checkbox selection, select all, delivery mode selector, and Ship button with count. Backend APIs for /shippable-orders and /bulk-push working correctly. All existing features (Rate Calculator, Shipments, Tracking) passed regression tests.
critical_code_review_comments: LogisticsDashboard.jsx: BulkShip component well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
logistics.py: /shippable-orders endpoint correctly filters paid+unfulfilled orders from customers collection
logistics.py: /bulk-push endpoint handles errors gracefully (order not found, already booked)
Good UX: Ship button shows count of selected orders, select all checkbox works correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 423 shippable orders from customers collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Shipping feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) Bulk Ship tab loads 423+ ready orders from /api/logistics/shippable-orders. 2) Orders table shows order number, customer name, phone, items summary, and Ready badge. 3) Search filter works (e.g., '9891' returns 3 matching orders). 4) Checkbox selection updates Ship button count (e.g., 'Ship (1)', 'Ship (25)'). 5) Select all checkbox toggles all selectable orders. 6) Delivery mode selector (Surface/Air) works. 7) /bulk-push endpoint handles invalid orders with proper error messages. 8) All existing features (Rate Calculator, Shipments, Tracking) still working.

bulk_ship_tab.details: Tab loads with 423 orders ready, table shows order number, customer name, phone, items summary, Ready badge

bulk_ship_search.details: Search filter works - searching '9891' returns 3 orders matching order number or phone

bulk_ship_selection.details: Checkbox selection works, Ship button shows count (e.g., 'Ship (1)', 'Ship (25)')

bulk_ship_select_all.details: Select all checkbox toggles all selectable orders (25 per page)

shippable_orders_api.details: GET /api/logistics/shippable-orders returns 423 paid+unfulfilled orders with pagination and search

bulk_push_api.details: POST /api/logistics/bulk-push handles invalid orders correctly with error messages

rate_calculator_regression.details: Rate Calculator still works - Surface (₹90) and Air (₹130) rates display correctly

shipments_regression.details: Shipments tab lists existing booking TNVC-TEST-002 with AWB TNVC0000000004

tracking_regression.details: Track tab - AWB TNVC0000000004 shows ORDER CONFIRMED status at Delhi with history

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real Innofulfill API calls - no mocking. Did NOT test actual bulk push to avoid creating real shipments.

note_on_bulk_push_testing: As per instructions, did NOT actually push orders to Innofulfill during testing to avoid creating real shipments. Tested with invalid order number (999999999) to verify error handling. The endpoint exists and handles errors correctly.
